rubrics.name: System Decomposition & Architecture Design
rubrics.description: Evaluate identification of core systems (payments engine, fraud detection, settlement, APIs, etc.), modular decomposition, and clarity of architectural flow.

rubrics.name: Data Flow & Interaction Design
rubrics.description: Evaluate how well the participant explains data exchange between components (latency, consistency, throughput, event flow, APIs, messaging systems).

rubrics.name: Scalability, Reliability & Fault Tolerance
rubrics.description: Assess ability to design for high TPS, concurrency, failover, redundancy, graceful degradation, and handling peak loads (10x spikes).

rubrics.name: Failure Analysis & Mitigation Strategies
rubrics.description: Evaluate identification of failure points (technical, integration, external) and robustness of mitigation strategies (circuit breakers, retries, fallback, reconciliation).

rubrics.name: Trade-offs, Compliance & Business Alignment
rubrics.description: Assess understanding of architectural trade-offs (CAP, latency vs consistency, cost vs reliability), regulatory constraints (PCI DSS, ISO), and business impact/ROI.

rubrics.name: Clarity, Structure & Presentation
rubrics.description: Evaluate logical flow, structuring (sections/diagrams), readability, and ability to communicate complex architecture clearly.
